dashboard.label: CalypsoAI - GenAI Security Overview
dashboard.description: Reusable dashboard for CalypsoAI event monitoring.

search.query: index=$tok_index$ $tok_sources$ sourcetype=calypsoai earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | stats count AS total_events

index=$tok_index$ $tok_sources$ sourcetype=calypsoai earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | spath | eval scanner_outcome=coalesce(scanner_outcome, 'event.scanner_outcome') | where lower(scanner_outcome)="fail" OR lower(scanner_outcome)="failed" | stats count AS failed_events

index=$tok_index$ $tok_sources$ sourcetype=calypsoai earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | spath | eval scanner_outcome=coalesce(scanner_outcome, 'event.scanner_outcome') | eval is_failed=if(lower(scanner_outcome)="fail" OR lower(scanner_outcome)="failed",1,0) | stats count AS total sum(is_failed) AS failed | eval failure_rate=round((failed/total)*100,2)
index=$tok_index$ $tok_sources$ sourcetype=calypsoai earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | timechart span=15m count AS events

index=$tok_index$ $tok_sources$ sourcetype=calypsoai earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | spath | eval scanner_outcome=coalesce(scanner_outcome, 'event.scanner_outcome', "unknown") | stats count by scanner_outcome | sort - count

index=$tok_index$ $tok_sources$ sourcetype=calypsoai earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | spath | eval event_type=coalesce(event_type, 'event.event_type', "unknown") | stats count by event_type | sort - count | head 20

index=$tok_index$ $tok_sources$ sourcetype=calypsoai earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | spath | eval project_id=coalesce(project_id, 'event.project_id', "unknown") | eval scanner_outcome=coalesce(scanner_outcome, 'event.scanner_outcome', "unknown") | eval is_failed=if(lower(scanner_outcome)="fail" OR lower(scanner_outcome)="failed",1,0) | stats count AS total_events sum(is_failed) AS failed_events by project_id | sort - failed_events | head 20
